title: Light Speeder - Ultimate Ride Coaster Deluxe (POV)
description: This is an example of an Ultimate Ride Coaster Deluxe coaster. I used what they call "accelerators" practically the whole length of the track. The G-forces are incredibly high, topping at 30 posotive g's in the most intense areas. There would be more than a mile of track if this coaster actually existed, if it was actually ride-able.
